div.head: The Acting Secretary of State to the Ambassador in Brazil (Morgam)The same, mutatis mutandis, on the same date to the missions in Argentina (No. 6), Chile (No. 14), Peru (No. 9), and Uruguay (No. 2).
div.p: 3. Captain Ralph A. O’Neill, representing the Boeing Airplane Company of Seattle, and the Pratt and Whitney Motor Corporation of Hartford, Connecticut, is sailing on S. S. Southern Cross February 11, for Rio de Janeiro for an experimental flight and to demonstrate before army and navy air service.
Please request free entry for equipment, including Boeing pursuit plane, Boeing mail plane and accessories, and ask permission for flight in Brazil. Reply by cable.
